GenAiFunction.description: Drafts finding narrative text from a failing replay check (given an audit case plus a replay check id or a rule code): the plain rule name and code, what the rule expects versus what the loan shows, why it matters, and the linked evidence. The text is a starting point suitable for the Finding Description field. Draft only — it never creates or edits a Finding record; the human auditor accepts or edits it and makes the final determination.
